title: [Crafting] More Copper Recipes
description: Adds more use to copper in crafting recipes where it is reasonable to use, such as crafters, powered rails, and hoppers!
body:
This pack makes copper slightly more useful by using it to craft powered rails, crafters, and hoppers. - Hoppers are crafted with 2 copper ingots and 3 iron ingots
- Powered Rails use copper ingots instead of gold ingots
- Crafters are crafted with copper ingots instead of iron ingots
This pack is designed to be compatible with [Advanced Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/advanced-recycling) by blocking the smelting recipe for powered rails to gold nuggets Check out [Coding's Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/collection/VQZNq4ph) collection for more crafting changes
